book: THE REVELATION OF ST. JOHN THE DIVINE

verses.text: \+w Unto the angel\+w* \+w of the church\+w* \+w of Ephesus\+w* \+w write\+w*; \+w These things\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w he that holdeth\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w seven\+w* \+w stars\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w right hand\+w*, \+w who walketh\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the midst\+w* \+w of the\+w* \+w seven\+w* \+w golden\+w* \+w candlesticks\+w*;

\+w I know\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w works\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w labour\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w patience\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w how\+w* \+w thou canst\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w bear\+w* \+w them which are evil\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w thou hast tried\+w* \+w them which say\+w* \+w they are\+w* \+w apostles\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w hast found\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w liars\+w*:

\+w And\+w* \+w hast borne\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w hast\+w* \+w patience\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w name’s\+w* \+w sake\+w* \+w hast laboured\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w hast\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w fainted\+w*.
\+w Nevertheless\+w* \+w I have\+w* \+add somewhat\+add* \+w against\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w thou hast left\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w first\+w* \+w love\+w*.

\+w Remember\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w from whence\+w* \+w thou art fallen\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w repent\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w do\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w first\+w* \+w works\+w*; \+w or else\+w* \+w I will come\+w* \+w unto thee\+w* \+w quickly\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w will remove\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w candlestick\+w* \+w out\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w place\+w*, \+w except\+w* \+w thou repent\+w*.
\+w But\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w thou hast\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w thou hatest\+w* \+w the deeds\+w* \+w of the Nicolaitans\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w I also\+w* \+w hate\+w*.

\+w He that hath\+w* \+w an ear\+w*, \+w let him hear\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w the Spirit\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w unto the churches\+w*; \+w To\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w that overcometh\+w* \+w will I give\+w* \+w to eat\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the tree\+w* \+w of life\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the midst\+w* \+w of the paradise\+w* \+w of God\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w unto the angel\+w* \+w of the church\+w* \+w in Smyrna\+w* \+w write\+w*; \+w These things\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w the first\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w the last\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w was\+w* \+w dead\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w is alive\+w*;

\+w I know\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w works\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w tribulation\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w poverty\+w*, (\+w but\+w* \+w thou art\+w* \+w rich\+w*) \+w and\+w* \+add I know\+add* \+w the blasphemy\+w* \+w of them which say\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w Jews\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+add are\+add* \+w the synagogue\+w* \+w of Satan\+w*.

\+w Fear\+w* \+w none\+w* \+w of those things which\+w* \+w thou shalt\+w* \+w suffer\+w*: \+w behold\+w*, \+w the devil\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w cast\+w* \+add some\+add* \+w of\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w prison\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w ye may be tried\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w ye shall have\+w* \+w tribulation\+w* \+w ten\+w* \+w days\+w*: \+w be thou\+w* \+w faithful\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w death\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w I will give\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w a crown\+w* \+w of life\+w*.

\+w He that hath\+w* \+w an ear\+w*, \+w let him hear\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w the Spirit\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w unto the churches\+w*; \+w He that overcometh\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w be hurt\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the second\+w* \+w death\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w to the angel\+w* \+w of the church\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w Pergamos\+w* \+w write\+w*; \+w These things\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w he which hath\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w sharp\+w* \+w sword\+w* \+w with two edges\+w*;

\+w I know\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w works\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w where\+w* \+w thou dwellest\+w*, \+add even\+add* \+w where\+w* \+w Satan’s\+w* \+w seat\+w* \+add is\+add*: \+w and\+w* \+w thou holdest fast\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w name\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w hast\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w denied\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w faith\+w*, \+w even\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w those days\+w* \+w wherein\+w* \+w Antipas\+w* \+add was\+add* \+w my\+w* \+w faithful\+w* \+w martyr\+w*, \+w who\+w* \+w was slain\+w* \+w among\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w where\+w* \+w Satan\+w* \+w dwelleth\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w I have\+w* \+w a few things\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w thou hast\+w* \+w there\+w* \+w them that hold\+w* \+w the doctrine\+w* \+w of Balaam\+w*, \+w who\+w* \+w taught\+w* \+w Balac\+w* \+w to cast\+w* \+w a stumblingblock\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w the children\+w* \+w of Israel\+w*, \+w to eat\+w* \+w things sacrificed unto idols\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w to commit fornication\+w*.
\+w So\+w* \+w hast\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w them that hold\+w* \+w the doctrine\+w* \+w of the Nicolaitans\+w*, \+w which thing\+w* \+w I hate\+w*.

\+w Repent\+w*; \+w or\+w* \+w else\+w* \+w I will come\+w* \+w unto thee\+w* \+w quickly\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w will fight\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w the sword\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w mouth\+w*.

\+w He that hath\+w* \+w an ear\+w*, \+w let him hear\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w the Spirit\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w unto the churches\+w*; \+w To him\+w* \+w that overcometh\+w* \+w will I give\+w* \+w to eat\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w hidden\+w* \+w manna\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w will give\+w* \+w him\+w* a \+w white\+w* \+w stone\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the stone\+w* \+w a\+w* \+w new\+w* \+w name\+w* \+w written\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w no man\+w* \+w knoweth\+w* \+w saving\+w* \+w he that receiveth\+w* \+add it.\+add*

\+w And\+w* \+w unto the angel\+w* \+w of the church\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w Thyatira\+w* \+w write\+w*; \+w These things\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w the Son\+w* \+w of God\+w*, \+w who hath\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w eyes\+w* \+w like unto\+w* \+w a flame\+w* \+w of fire\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w feet\+w* \+add are\+add* \+w like\+w* \+w fine brass\+w*;

\+w I know\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w works\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w charity\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w service\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w faith\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w patience\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w works\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w the last\+w* \+add to be\+add* \+w more\+w* \+w than the first\+w*.

\+w Notwithstanding\+w* \+w I have\+w* \+w a few things\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w thou sufferest\+w* \+w that woman\+w* \+w Jezebel\+w*, \+w which calleth\+w* \+w herself\+w* \+w a prophetess\+w*, \+w to teach\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w to seduce\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w servants\+w* \+w to commit fornication\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w to eat\+w* \+w things sacrificed unto idols\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w I gave\+w* \+w her\+w* \+w space\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w repent\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w her\+w* \+w fornication\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w she repented\+w* \+w not\+w*.

\+w Behold\+w*, \+w I\+w* \+w will cast\+w* \+w her\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w a bed\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w them that commit adultery\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w her\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w great\+w* \+w tribulation\+w*, \+w except\+w* \+w they repent\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w deeds\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w I will kill\+w* \+w her\+w* \+w children\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w death\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w the churches\+w* \+w shall know\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w am\+w* \+w he which searcheth\+w* \+w the reins\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w hearts\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w I will give\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w every one of\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w according to\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w works\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w unto you\+w* \+w I say\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w unto the rest\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w Thyatira\+w*, \+w as many as\+w* \+w have\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w doctrine\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w have\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w known\+w* \+w the depths\+w* \+w of Satan\+w*, \+w as\+w* \+w they speak\+w*; \+w I will put\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w none\+w* \+w other\+w* \+w burden\+w*.
\+w But\+w* \+w that which\+w* \+w ye have\+w* \+add already\+add* \+w hold fast\+w* \+w till\+w* \+w I come\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w he that overcometh\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w keepeth\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w works\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w the end\+w*, \+w to him\+w* \+w will I give\+w* \+w power\+w* \+w over\+w* \+w the nations\+w*:

\+w And\+w* \+w he shall rule\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w a rod\+w* \+w of iron\+w*; \+w as\+w* \+w the vessels\+w* \+w of a potter\+w* \+w shall they be broken to shivers\+w*: \+w even as\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w received\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w I will give\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w morning\+w* \+w star\+w*.
\+w He that hath\+w* \+w an ear\+w*, \+w let him hear\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w the Spirit\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w unto the churches\+w*.
